verses.text: Tua ciangin a teeknu Naomi in ama kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, inn khat na suan'theihna dingin na pasal ding kong vaihawmsak ding kilawm hilo ahi hiam
A numeite tawh na nasepna Boaz pen i tanau hilo ahi hiam? Thei in, amah in tu nitakin ancilna-ah mangbuhham haih hi
Tua ahih ciangin kisilin sathau kinuh in la, na puan hoihpente silhin ancilna-ah paisuk in. Ahih hangin a nek a dawn a man mateng ama kiangah na pailam kitheisak kei in
Ahih hangin amah a lup ciangin a lupna mun encik in; tua ciangin pai in la a khe lam puan leemin lum in; tua ciangin na gamtatna ding amah in hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Na gen khempeuh ka hih ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin ancilna-ah amah paisukin a teeknu in ama kiangah a gensa bang teekteekin a gamta hi
Boaz in a nek a dawn khit ciangin a lung nuam a, anphual nawlah lum dingin a pai hi. Tua ciangin damtakin numei hong pai-in a khe lam puan leem sakin a lumsuk hi
Zankim ciangin mipa a kihei ciangin a khe-ah numei khat na lum hi
Amah in, “Kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tuanu in dawngin, “Keimah na nasemnu Ruth ka hi hi; tanaute na hih ciangin na nasemnu na puan hong zawn in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen, ka tanu aw; a hau hita leh a zawng hita leh tangvalte' nung na zuihlohna-ah a masa sangin a lianzaw a tawpkhak hih ngeina man na gamta hi
Tu-in ka tanu aw, lau kei in; na nget khempeuh nang-a' dingin kong hihsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khuapih mite khempeuh in numei gina na hihlam hong thei uh hi
Kei pen tanau nai ka hi mah hi; ahih hangin kei sangin a naizaw tanau khat omlai hi

Tuzan om in; zingsang ciangin amah in nang tungah tanaute' hih ding hong hih leh pha hi; amah hih sak in. Ahih hangin nang tungah tanaute' sep ding a sepnop kei leh, tua ciangin, Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin nang tungah tanau nasep kong sem ding hi. Zingsang dong lum in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin zingsang dong a khe kiangah lum a, ahih hangin mi meel khatlekhat a kitheih ma-in amah a tho hi. Tua ciangin mipa in, “Ancilna-ah numei a paina kitheisak kei in,” a ci hi
Mipa in, “Na puanza hong paipih in la hong dawh in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a numei in dawh a, amah in mangbuhham lawh guk tehkhia-in tuanu guan' a, tua ciangin khuapi sungah tuanu a ciah hi
A teeknu kiangah a tun' ciangin amah in, “Ka tanu aw, bang na ci hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a thu khempeuh genin
“Hih mangbuhham lawh guk hong guan' hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Na teeknu kiangah khut hawmguakin na ciah kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Amah in dawngin, “Ka tanu aw, a thu hong bangci suahkhiat cih na theih mateng ngak in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mawk omlo ding a, tuni-in a thu siangsak ding hi,” a ci hi.
